step2_verification.qa_pairs:

10. [SUPPORTED] Q: Does the document describe the technique "T1059.001" (Command and Scripting Interpreter: PowerShell) as being used specifically for "Execution" — not a different tactic or phase of the attack?

   A: Yes.

item.evidence_snippet: WatchDog was observed to use Steganography to mask the transfer of malware that was hosted on compromised cloud storage buckets.
